name: Holo Messenger
summary: Every messenger, one inbox. Real messages from WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack and more stream into a single, instantly-familiar chat surface — each message lifted into a self-verifying κ, each conversation a signed source chain. No homeserver, no protocol bridges: the message you already see, made yours and verifiable.

description.p: Beeper unifies messengers by running a re-implemented protocol bridge per service into a Matrix homeserver. Holo Messenger needs neither: every platform is already rendered in an authenticated tab in the native browser, so a 'bridge' is just a per-platform selector map (data) feeding the pluck spine. Each message becomes a content-addressed κ; capture it twice — or on two platforms with the same words — and it is one κ (dedup).

A conversation is a holo-apps Collection: a genesis κ that names it, with each message an immutable, operator-signed, hash-linked event on a per-conversation source chain (holo-strand). The head κ attests the whole ordered history — drop, reorder, or tamper any message and it refuses (Law L5). Messages stream tab-to-inbox over the κ pub/sub codec in the same tick; a content-blind relay never sees inside, and every surface re-derives a message before it paints (verify-before-trust, SEC-1).

ul: One familiar inbox — chat list, thread, composer — across every platform
Real-time: a message rendered in a platform tab appears here in the same tick, no server
Self-verifying: every bubble re-derives to its κ before it shows; tampered → refused, not shown
Serverless and sovereign: conversations are signed chains under your own key, encrypted at rest

releases.description: The unified inbox surface. A WhatsApp-familiar chat list + thread + composer projected from per-conversation signed source chains; messages captured from any platform by a selector-map adapter, minted to self-verifying κ, streamed in real time over the κ pub/sub codec, and re-derived verify-before-trust before they paint. Send-to-platform (TEE step-up gate) and post-quantum epoch keys land next.
